images.prompt: Professional electronics cable harness and wire assembly workbench in a Shenzhen factory. Bundled multi-color wires with connectors, crimping tools, heat shrink tubing organized on clean white ESD work surface. Overhead industrial lighting, shallow depth of field on the harness bundle. Professional B2B manufacturing photography style, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Close-up of industrial laser cutting machine precisely cutting a stainless steel SMT stencil. Bright laser beam point on metal surface with tiny apertures pattern visible. Dark technical background with subtle golden-copper accent lighting. Professional PCB manufacturing photography, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Macro close-up view of laser-cut SMT stencil apertures showing smooth electro-polished inner walls. Stainless steel surface with precise rectangular openings in a grid pattern. Golden-copper industrial lighting highlighting the polished aperture edges. Clean technical photography style, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Technical cross-section illustration of a step stencil showing two different thickness levels on one stainless steel sheet. One side thicker for power components, one side thinner for fine-pitch ICs. Clean vector-style technical diagram with subtle golden-copper accent on the step transition area. Dark background, no people faces, no text, no logos.

SMT step stencil mounted on solder paste printer with tension frame. Stainless steel stencil with visible stepped thickness zone under industrial lighting. Clean PCB manufacturing environment, golden-copper accent reflections on metal surface. Professional B2B photography, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Industrial stencil fabrication workstation showing stainless steel sheet being processed. Precision manufacturing equipment, clean organized workspace. Subtle golden-copper industrial lighting. Professional PCB manufacturing environment, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Electronics box-build assembly undergoing functional testing on a test bench. Enclosure with PCB inside connected to test equipment via cables and probes. Organized industrial test station with clean ESD-safe setup, professional lighting. Golden-copper accent on test equipment indicators. B2B manufacturing photography, no people faces, no text, no logos.

Finished electronics products being packaged in anti-static bags and custom foam inserts inside cardboard boxes. Clean organized packaging workstation with labeling machine, barcode scanner. Industrial warehouse lighting with warm accent tones. Professional B2B logistics photography, no people faces, no text, no logos.
